enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.title: Enhanced Storage
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.enableSt: Toggle the custom storage dashboard on or off.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.overlayC: Number of page columns displayed in the scroll panel (1–6).
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.showEmpt: Display pages that have not been visited yet.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.showUnav: Display locked ender chest pages and locked or empty backpack slots. Clicking them is always blocked.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.autoScro: Automatically snap scroll so the open page is visible.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.showPrev: Display item tooltips when hovering over non-active page previews.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.searchHi: Colour applied to matching items during search (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA).
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.overlayT: Visual style for the storage overlay sprites.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.storageO: When to show the storage overview panel left of the inventory. Hiding it re-centers the inventory.
enhanced_storage.midnightconfig.saveCurs: Keep the cursor where it was when moving between inventory screens. Defers to SkyBlock-Enhancements when that mod's cursor saving is enabled.
